styles.container: max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #111111; line-height: 1.6;
styles.title: margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 34px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 700; color: #111111;
styles.image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.12); margin: 8px auto;
styles.row_wrapper: margin: 10px 0; display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;
styles.row_image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.12); margin: 8px auto;
styles.float_left: float: left; width: 42%; max-width: 360px; margin: 8px 18px 10px 0; display: block; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
styles.float_right: float: right; width: 42%; max-width: 360px; margin: 8px 0 10px 18px; display: block; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
